name: Columbina, Arlecchino and Sandrone
description:
A little bit of negotiation

Genshin Impact bot! God, it's been a long time since I made one. To be really honest, I don't know much about Columbina. I stopped caring a bit about Genshin after Fontaine. But I have a friend who became obsessed with her after that horror animation where Columbina is a biblically accurate angel who scares Dottore and sends him to the backrooms or something like that. It's really a good Analog Horror, ngl. But anyway, if you still play Genshin (which you shouldn't), you already understand that this bot takes place before the current events of the game, since Columbina is still in the Fatui. I updated the bot and now Arlecchino and Sandrone are also in the bot. Why didn't I add Signora as well, since she's in the image? Let's be honest, nobody cares about Signora. The first scenario is for when you don't want to go straight to the sexual part, while the second is only for when you want to skip the conversation and go straight to sex. I hope you like it.

I should have actually posted this bot like, a week ago I think? Why I didn't? Simple, Hollow Knight Silksong. I bought it and it's been sucking up all my free time ever since. And as someone who achieved 112% and got all the achievements in Hollow Knight, I feel obligated to do the same with Silksong.

Today I went to see the Chainsaw Man movie. My God, it was so fucking peak. Perhaps the fact that I was literally the only living soul in that movie theater enhanced my experience, but even so, that film is incredible. It reminded me of how much I love Reze.

The next bot will be a character from Gachiakuta. I honestly doubt anyone will guess who. Not that anyone really cares. Anyways, here's the link to the PFP image.

Let me know in the comments if my bot has any errors or inconsistencies so I can improve them. Remember, reviews are appreciated and fell free to make a request in the comments. It's totally free.
creator: Peizin
